news.t: First Trust Advisors L.P. Announces Distributions for Exchange-Traded Funds
First Trust Advisors L.P. Announces Distribution for FT Vest U.S. Equity Buffer & Premium Income ETF - December
First Trust Advisors L.P. Announces Distribution for Exchange-Traded Funds

overview.description: The FT Vest U.S. Equity Buffer & Premium Income ETF - December (XIDE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in income alternatives. The fund seeks to provide a consistent income stream and a buffer against the first 10% of losses over a one-year period. The actively managed fund holds a package of SPY FLEX options and US Treasurys. XIDE was launched on Dec 15, 2023 and is issued by First Trust.
